analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet celebrates Chinese Teachers' Day, praises teachers, and highlights a Chinese tradition of respecting teachers and valuing education. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not referenced or implied. CH2 (China as benevolent power internationally) – No mention of international conduct or multilateralism. CH3 (Epic history/adversity) – No historical struggle or resilience themes. CH4 (Appropriate political system and honorable values) – It promotes honorable cultural values tied to Chinese society (respecting teachers, valuing education) in a domestic context, which aligns with portraying Chinese values positively; while not explicitly about the political system, it fits the “honorable values” aspect. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – No mention of government achievements or policy outcomes. CH6 (Interesting culture/nature/heritage) – It highlights a cultural tradition; this fits promoting Chinese traditions and society. Conclusion: CH4 and CH6 apply.
